success200.simulatedOutcome: Approves unlimited token spending to unknown spender

llmAnalysis.text:
High risk approval pattern.
• Verify spender and token
Verdict: malicious
Flags: unlimited_approval, unverified_contract
llmAnalysis.disclaimer: This AI assessment is heuristic only; it is not a security guarantee nor a substitute for professional audit.

success200._contractProbeNote: If TRUST_FUJI_RPC_URL is unset: probeError no_rpc_url; kind/bytecodeLengthBytes may be absent
success200._explorerNote: Without verified source: sourceVerified false and paidFlags may include EXPLORER_SOURCE_NOT_VERIFIED; Solidity is not included in the 200 JSON (LLM prompt only)
success200._llmNote: llmAnalysis only when TRUST_LLM_ENABLED=true and Ollama succeeds; structured JSON with verdict/flags/summary; otherwise optional llmSkippedReason

paymentRequired402Standard._note: maxAmountRequired depends on TRUST_SETTLE_PRICE_USD (e.g. $0.001 → 1000); includes x-request-id header on response

accepts.description: TRUST paid risk check (deep LLM analysis)

error.message: Only Avalanche Fuji (43113) is supported in MVP
